data.name: Ore no Yome VR
data.detailed_description:
Have sex with your cute girlfriend in VR!
With VR, you can have sex with your cute girlfriend anytime and anywhere!
There are multiple positions and the speed can be changed freely!
You can move freely and have sex anywhere you like!


You can change the movement and rotation mode to teleport movement or snap turn!
The left and right controls can be switched and can be operated with one hand!

Girls can customize their faces, bodies, hair, colors, and more to suit their tastes!



You can also switch the man display from normal display to semi-transparent or invisible!


You can freely project onto the in-game monitor in camera mode!
You can also scale the monitor and grab it to place it wherever you like!

data.short_description: Have sex with your cute girlfriend in VR! You can create the bride of your choice with a wealth of customization elements! The left and right controls can be switched and can be operated with one hand!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows10 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 4590
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or GTX 1060 or better/ AMD R9 290 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR　Meta Quest 3
